generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy temperature sensor providing data for adaptive control policies and environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy humidity sensor providing data for adaptive control policies and environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy CO2 sensor providing data for adaptive control policies and environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy light sensor providing data for adaptive control policies and environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy occupancy sensor providing data for adaptive control policies and environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data transmission from physical sensor to digital twin via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for continuous synchronization"
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data transmission from physical sensor to digital twin via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for continuous synchronization"
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 data transmission from physical sensor to digital twin via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for continuous synchronization"
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
    base:desc "Real-time light data transmission from physical sensor to digital twin via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for continuous synchronization"
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data transmission from physical sensor to digital twin via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for continuous synchronization"
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time light data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for device communication and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive visualization of digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance BIMModelingTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM modeling tools for semantic extraction and automated transformation from BIM to runtime artifacts for reproducible setups"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based model providing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of the building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTools
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for continuous building operation tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortAssessmentInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectAnalysisInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for building operation scenarios and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for energy optimization, visual comfort assessment, and non-visual health effect analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortAssessmentInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectAnalysisInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service for energy consumption and building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization service using Unreal Engine 5 for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAssessmentInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for facility management decisions related to energy consumption optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortAssessmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for facility management decisions related to visual comfort assessment"
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for facility management decisions related to non-visual health effect analysis"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator for Building Control Systems (BCS) controlling lighting with domain-specific control semantics embedded into BIM models for automation"
]

instance BuildingInfrastructure : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in a Living Lab case study for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle-encompassing optimization of building operations"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, HumiditySensor, CO2Sensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals sent from the digital twin to Building Control Systems (BCS) for operational adjustments, enabled by bidirectional communication through Eclipse Hono and Ditto."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with no specific time intervals specified; continuous data exchange for immediate updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A central hub framework integrating Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and standardized extension points for modular service-oriented DT platforms."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the complete building life cycle from initial design to refurbishments and adaptations during operation, enabling life cycle-encompassing optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure alignment between the digital twin and physical counterpart, ensuring interoperability and architectural soundness."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange; specific network protocols not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standardized BIM semantics for model-driven transformation, leveraging BIM as a construction industry standard, with standardized extension points for interoperability."
]
